abstract: Managing AI Wisely: From Development to Organizational Change in Practice (i.e., "Managing AI Wisely") is an informative and useful publication to better understand the field of AI.Though the book is only 141 pages, it took me about eight days of periodic reading (with various starting and stopping points) to get through the comprehensive text.While I will discuss the content shortly, it is good to note that there are a variety of tables, models, and graphics throughout the book to help illustrate the narrative.Additionally, there are chapter summaries, notes, and sectional boxes with additional content provided.I believe that the book, which was recently published (2021), can serve as a valuable reference for the subject of AI or a resource for teaching, writing reports, and conducting research; in other words, I feel the $40.00 ebook investment would be money well-spent.My motivations for reading Managing AI Wisely were twofold.First, it stemmed from my employer's invested interest in the subject.I work in academia and AI is a widely discussed topic at the moment.It is a highly prioritized issue at my university (demonstrated through detailed leadership communications, frequent faculty and staff training, and AI was selected for the theme of our university's annual research conference); as such, I sought to learn more about AI to remain professionally informed.However, my general curiosity in learning more about this dynamic field was also influential in my decision to read Managing AI Wisely.I wanted to learn more about the subject: the development of the field, specifics of operations, and how AI is practically useful.All of my questions were answered by Managing AI Wisely and I was left highly informed

ob.ai_reason: AI管理书籍综述核心涉及AI与组织变革
ob.tldr: 该书评概述《Managing AI Wisely》全书框架，聚焦AI从研发到组织变革的全链条管理。评者指出，书中通过案例、模型和工具阐释AI项目治理、文化适配及人员技能提升等关键环节，为组织引入AI提供实践指南。

title: Managing AI wisely: From development to organizational change in practice by LaurenWaardenburg, MarleenHuysman, MarlousAgterberg. Cheltenham, UK: Edward Elgar Publishing Limited, 2021, 141 pages, $110.00, hardcover
title_zh: 明智地管理AI：从开发到实践中的组织变革
